meta.certificationName: Microsoft Certified: Fabric Data Engineer Associate (DP-700)
meta.title: MS-FDE-3: OneLake, Orchestration, Streaming, and Optimization

questions.stem: A Fabric team wants a single logical data lake that can be shared by lakehouses, warehouses, and real-time analytics items without copying files. Which Fabric component provides that foundation?
questions.explanation:
**B** is correct because the official documentation supports that choice for the stated scenario. The remaining options do not directly meet the requirement.

[OneLake, the unified data lake - Microsoft Fabric](https://learn.microsoft.com/fabric/onelake/onelake-overview)

questions.stem: Why do Fabric lakehouses commonly use Delta tables instead of plain parquet folders for curated data?

**A** is correct because the official documentation supports that choice for the stated scenario. The remaining options do not directly meet the requirement.
